title: After the Hong Kong Fire Killed 3 Generations of His Family, A Son Searches for Justice
summary_full: Lee Chun Ho lost four members of his household in last November’s apartment-tower blaze. He’s now telling an investigative committee what contractors ignored.
summary_public: Lee Chun Ho lost four members of his household in last November’s apartment-tower blaze. He’s now telling an investigative committee what contractors ignored.
